channel.title: Jihun Roh
channel.description: I’m Jihun Roh, a director at the Ministry of Land, Infrastructure and Transport in South Korea, currently on UK sabbatical. Passionate about bicycle 🚴, dog 🐶, photo 📷, and writing ✏️

item.title: London - Anglesey - London 2026
item.description: Barely finished London-Anglesey-London, my second Audax and a 1000k BRM, in 74:30. As my longest ride featuring two consecutive sleepless nights, it was full of twists and turns.

item.title: Nordic Chase 2026
item.description: Participated in a 700km+ race from Copenhagen, Denmark to Oslo, Norway. Thanks to pristine roads, stunning scenery, and flat terrain, I completed my first multi-day overnight ride without major difficulties.
